name: Switch
description: Pill-shaped track (52 × 32) with a circular thumb (28 × 28) that translates between the two ends. Off paints the track in `surfaceContainerHighest` with an `outlineVariant` hairline stroke and an `onSurfaceVariant` thumb; on paints the track in `primary` and the thumb in `onPrimary` so the on-state reads chromatically. Whole control is the click target — the thumb is decorative. Instant commit: `onCheckedChange` fires the moment the thumb moves.

checked.description: Controlled value. When provided, the consumer owns the state; pair with `onCheckedChange`.

defaultChecked.description: Uncontrolled initial value. Ignored when `checked` is also passed.

onCheckedChange.description: Called with `(nextChecked, event)` the moment the user flips the switch.

aria-label.description: Accessible label. Required when the Switch is not paired with a visible label via `aria-labelledby` or a wrapping `<label>`.

aria-labelledby.description: ID of the element that names this Switch. Mutually exclusive with `aria-label`.

forcedState.description: Docs-only — pins the switch to a single visual state via `data-force-state`. Not for production use.

track.description: Pill-shaped container. 52 × 32, fully rounded. Carries the click handler, the focus ring, and the state-overlay paint. `role='switch'`, `aria-checked` reflects on/off.

thumb.description: Circular knob inside the track. 28 × 28, fully rounded. Translates between the leading and trailing ends on toggle. Decorative — never a separate hit target.

off.note: Resting muted tone. The hairline outline reads the track as a discrete affordance even when both the track and the host surface are quiet.

on.note: Chromatic on-state. The outline disappears so the filled track reads as one solid block. Thumb steps to `onPrimary` so the contrast against the filled track stays legible.

disabled.note: Both the on and off appearance fade to `sys.state.disabled`. The thumb stays at the position dictated by `checked`.

focusIndicator.description: Keyboard-focus visual painted as a three-layer outward ring on the track's outer edge.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Switch sits inline next to siblings with whitespace around it (form rows, settings list trailing slots); an outward ring reads cleanly without colliding with neighbouring affordances.

ring.implementation: outset box-shadow on the track's `::after` overlay.

focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

behavior.instantCommit: `onCheckedChange` fires the moment the user releases the click / Space / Enter. No confirmation step.
behavior.clickTarget: Whole track is clickable. The thumb is decorative — never a separate hit target.
behavior.keyboardActivation: Space and Enter both toggle the value when the switch holds focus.

forbidden: switch used for an action that needs confirmation (a destructive commit, an action with an undo) — wrap that in a Button + Dialog instead
track outline removed in the off state — the hairline outline is the only edge that holds the affordance when the host is quiet
thumb rendered as a separate focusable / clickable element — only the track carries focus and click
trailing label or icon painted inside the track — the on/off contract is the whole control; any label sits outside the Switch (in a List row label, a FormField label, etc.)
switch laid out next to its label without a 12px / `sys.layout.inline.md` gap — the gap stops the label from reading as if it were part of the control
